children.heading: Application of subchapter C rules
children.label: a Application of subchapter C rules
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this title, and except to the extent inconsistent with this subchapter, subchapter C shall apply to an S corporation and its shareholders.

children.heading: No carryover between C year and S year
children.label: b No carryover between C year and S year

children.heading: From C year to S year
children.label: 1 From C year to S year
children.text: No carryforward, and no carryback, arising for a taxable year for which a corporation is a C corporation may be carried to a taxable year for which such corporation is an S corporation.

children.heading: No carryover from S year
children.label: 2 No carryover from S year
children.text: No carryforward, and no carryback, shall arise at the corporate level for a taxable year for which a corporation is an S corporation.

children.heading: Treatment of S year as elapsed year
children.label: 3 Treatment of S year as elapsed year
children.text: Nothing in paragraphs (1) and (2) shall prevent treating a taxable year for which a corporation is an S corporation as a taxable year for purposes of determining the number of taxable years to which an item may be carried back or carried forward.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraphs (2) and (3) and subsection (d)(3), no adjustment shall be made to the earnings and profits of an S corporation.

children.heading: Adjustments for redemptions, liquidations, reorganizations, divisives, etc.
children.label: 2 Adjustments for redemptions, liquidations, reorganizations, divisives, etc.
children.text: In the case of any transaction involving the application of subchapter C to any S corporation, proper adjustment to any accumulated earnings and profits of the corporation shall be made.

children.heading: Adjustments in case of distributions treated as dividends under section 1368(c)(2)
children.label: 3 Adjustments in case of distributions treated as dividends under section 1368(c)(2)
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply with respect to that portion of a distribution which is treated as a dividend under section 1368(c)(2).

children.heading: Coordination with investment credit recapture
children.label: d Coordination with investment credit recapture

children.heading: No recapture by reason of election
children.label: 1 No recapture by reason of election
children.text: Any election under section 1362 shall be treated as a mere change in the form of conducting a trade or business for purposes of the second sentence of section 50(a)(6).

children.heading: Corporation continues to be liable
children.label: 2 Corporation continues to be liable
children.text: Notwithstanding an election under section 1362, an S corporation shall continue to be liable for any increase in tax under section 49(b) or 50(a) attributable to credits allowed for taxable years for which such corporation was not an S corporation.

children.heading: Adjustment to earnings and profits for amount of recapture
children.label: 3 Adjustment to earnings and profits for amount of recapture
children.text: Paragraph (1) of subsection (c) shall not apply to any increase in tax under section 49(b) or 50(a) for which the S corporation is liable.

children.heading: Cash distributions during post-termination transition period
children.label: e Cash distributions during post-termination transition period

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Any distribution of money by a corporation with respect to its stock during a post-termination transition period shall be applied against and reduce the adjusted basis of the stock, to the extent that the amount of the distribution does not exceed the accumulated adjustments account (within the meaning of section 1368(e)).

children.heading: Election to distribute earnings first
children.label: 2 Election to distribute earnings first
children.text: An S corporation may elect to have paragraph (1) not apply to all distributions made during a post-termination transition period described in section 1377(b)(1)(A). Such election shall not be effective unless all shareholders of the S corporation to whom distributions are made by the S corporation during such post-termination transition period consent to such election.

children.heading: Cash distributions following post-termination transition period
children.label: f Cash distributions following post-termination transition period
children.text: In the case of a distribution of money by an eligible terminated S corporation (as defined in section 481(d)) after the post-termination transition period, the accumulated adjustments account shall be allocated to such distribution, and the distribution shall be chargeable to accumulated earnings and profits, in the same ratio as the amount of such accumulated adjustments account bears to the amount of such accumulated earnings and profits.
